templates.label: Classic Builder
templates.code:
classDiagram
    class Meal {
        -bun: String
        -patties: int
        -cheese: String
        -sauce: String
        -size: String
        -price: double
        +toString() String
    }
    class MealBuilder {
        -bun: String
        -patties: int
        -cheese: String
        -sauce: String
        -size: String
        -price: double
        +setBun(bun: String) MealBuilder
        +setPatties(n: int) MealBuilder
        +setCheese(cheese: String) MealBuilder
        +setSauce(sauce: String) MealBuilder
        +setSize(size: String) MealBuilder
        +setPrice(price: double) MealBuilder
        +build() Meal
    }
    MealBuilder ..> Meal : creates

templates.label: Builder + Director
templates.code:
classDiagram
    class Meal {
        -bun: String
        -patties: int
        -cheese: String
        -sauce: String
        -size: String
        +toString() String
    }
    class MealBuilder {
        +setBun(bun: String) MealBuilder
        +setPatties(n: int) MealBuilder
        +setCheese(cheese: String) MealBuilder
        +setSauce(sauce: String) MealBuilder
        +setSize(size: String) MealBuilder
        +build() Meal
    }
    class MealRecipes {
        +kidsMeal()$ Meal
        +gourmetBurger()$ Meal
        +veggieWrap()$ Meal
    }
    MealBuilder ..> Meal : creates
    MealRecipes ..> MealBuilder : uses

templates.label: Sequence Diagram
templates.code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant B as Meal.Builder
    participant M as Meal

    C->>B: new Builder()
    activate B
    C->>B: setBun("Sesame bun")
    B-->>C: this (Builder)
    C->>B: setPatties(2)
    B-->>C: this (Builder)
    C->>B: setCheese("Cheddar")
    B-->>C: this (Builder)
    C->>B: build()
    B->>B: validate fields
    B->>M: new Meal(this)
    activate M
    M-->>B: meal instance
    deactivate M
    B-->>C: Meal (immutable)
    deactivate B
